nomenclature_rule.two_number_suffix: parent step plus sub-order inside that step/batch
nomenclature_rule.exception: Query_Content2: the 2 is part of the real base filename

series_lane.purpose: Trigger remote series pipeline and capture/track series pipeline output.
Invoke raw router worker to classify and route raw payloads.

subfiles.purpose: Route raw payloads into pickup/default, pickup/arrays, or quarantine lanes.

series_lane.purpose: Run local series grinder workers that split raw provider payloads into structured JSON fragments.
series_lane.contract_gap: needs governed orchestration and subcomponent logging if migrated

series_lane.purpose: Normalize and process array-shaped raw payloads.

subfiles.purpose: Normalize raw local payloads into normalized form.
Grind array-shaped payloads into structured fragments.

series_lane.contract_gap: PHP logging/signal/kill-switch adapter needed if governed

epg_lane.parent_file_uploaded: trigger to download epg-xml to c miratv_ingest-export step 1.ps1

needs bounded loop, kill switch, logging, heartbeat/progress, signal

epg_lane.purpose: Governed EPG acquisition, upload, and import pipeline.

subfiles.purpose: Governed server-side EPG import queue runner.

provider_pull_spine.purpose: Legacy/current provider pull spine entry point for Live, VOD, Series, and EPG acquisition.
provider_pull_spine.contract_gap: needs governed orchestrator, per-media subcomponent logging, signal, kill switch, bounded execution

provider_pull_spine.purpose: Provider API pull workers that acquire Live/VOD/Series/EPG payloads into local raw/state folders.
provider_pull_spine.contract_gap: needs governed worker contract and provider domain/secret abstraction

provider_pull_spine.purpose: Import locally acquired provider payloads into DB/server-side ingest endpoints.
